name: gateway-http-connect-fallback-v1
title: Gateway HTTP CONNECT fallback v1
description: Fix overseas HTTP CONNECT fallback by supporting HTTP proxy upstreams, bounded gateway attempt timeouts, and process-local failure cooldowns.
creator: nightrain
notes: Deployed to dev via MCP HTTP update_service and validated with readonly smoke plus live CONNECT probes. WARP failures are bounded to the three configured instances, then cooled down; remaining overseas instability is free-pool quality.
